popupApiKeyTooltip.message: Stored locally only, never synced or uploaded

popupAnthropicWarning.message: Anthropic API requires special access mode when called directly from browsers, which may pose security risks. Use only in trusted network environments.

popupAnthropicAck.message: I understand and accept the risks

statusLoadFailed.message: Failed to load settings, please refresh

validationHttpsOnly.message: HTTPS only. Please use an address starting with https://

validationNoPrivateIp.message: Private network addresses are not supported

validationPathRequired.message: Please provide full API path, e.g. /v1/chat/completions

validationOpenAIKeyFormat.message: OpenAI API Key should start with sk-

validationAnthropicKeyFormat.message: Anthropic API Key should start with sk-ant-

statusConfirmAnthropic.message: Please confirm the Anthropic security warning first

onboardingStep1Desc.message: Choose your AI service provider and enter API Key. Your key will be encrypted and stored locally — never uploaded or synced.

onboardingStep2Desc.message: Press <kbd>Cmd</kbd>/<kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>E</kbd> to enhance the current input.

onboardingStep2Hint.message: Tip: You can also click the ✨ button next to the input

onboardingStep3Desc.message: All set! Type your prompt in any input field, then click the enhance button or use the shortcut.

onboardingStep3Desc2.message: Enhanced results will preview in real-time — apply or cancel as you wish.

toastClickInput.message: Please click an input field first

toastRefreshPage.message: Extension updated, please refresh the page

errorConfigApiKey.message: Please configure an API Key in extension settings

trialWelcomeDesc.message: You have 10 free trials — no setup needed. After the trial, configure your own API Key for unlimited use.

trialConfigHint.message: Configure API Key for unlimited use

trialExpiredDesc.message: Configure your API Key to continue

trialExpiredOverlayDesc.message: Your 10 free trials have been used. Configure an API Key to continue using Lynx. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Gemini, Kimi, MiniMax, Qwen, Zhipu and more.

trialHowToGetKey.message: How to get an API Key?

trialStep1.message: Sign up for an AI service provider

trialStep2.message: Create an API Key in the console
